name: recat-qbo
description: Self-hosted transaction categorization and review queue for QuickBooks Online. An open-source alternative to Uncat.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
